name: Butler University
description: Butler University is a path to endless possibilities. Our experienced faculty and staff, outstanding facilities, and innovative programs all point to one transformative goal: giving students the tools to grow and excel personally and professionally in an ever-changing world. Based in Indianapolis–one of the heartland's largest and most dynamic cities–Butler has been named the No. 1 Regional University and Most Innovative School in the Midwest, according to U.S. News and World Report. Our approach to education is focused on lifetime learning and designed for both career success and personal fulfillment. Students learn by doing, whether in the lab, boardroom, the community, or across the globe. Perhaps most importantly at Butler, problems are never faced alone. Our commitment to student well-being provides mentoring, counseling, and support to enhance mind, body, and spirit–precisely what students need to realize their potential and discover their best selves.

name: PGAV Destinations
description:
PGAV Destinations creates business-results-oriented master plans, pilots in-depth industry research, and designs beautiful, innovative products for destinations around the world. 

Now in our fifth decade of practice, our thousands of projects in more than 30 states and five continents can be found thrilling, educating, and moving guests in zoos, museums, aquariums, theme parks, resorts, and deeply valuable historic sites. 

We believe in the power of leisure and travel experiences to enrich lives, enhance communities, and celebrate culture, nature, and heritage. That’s why our staff of more than 100 full-time artists¸ architects, storytellers, business strategists, designers, interpreters, planners, and more work in seamless integration to empower these destinations to realize their full potential. 

No other firm in the world integrates such a powerfully diverse team, insightful primary and secondary research, over five decades of international experience, start-to-finish strategic master plans and associated destination design, and deeply-impactful storytelling to open more completed projects in more locations for a greater variety of destinations. From the smallest non-for-profit to the world’s largest aquarium – we are there to enable clients to envision and achieve their goals.

We’re recognized for thinking deeply, planning carefully, and acting boldly on behalf of our lifelong clients, whom are growing by the minute. View here: http://tinyurl.com/cujbj82.

WSU’s statewide system includes campuses in Pullman, Spokane, Everett, Tri-Cities and Vancouver, with extension and research offices in every county of the state, and a nationally ranked online program. 

WSU is well known for its programs in veterinary medicine, agriculture, engineering, architecture, global animal health, food science, plant science, business, human health, pharmacy, neuroscience, communications, biofuels, sleep, business, education, energy. And, WSU athletics teams compete in the NCAA’s Pac-12 Conference.

We are Tracker, the industry-leading provider of people-centric recruitment software

✅ We offer a sophisticated ATS & CRM in one platform.

✅ Our unwavering, industry-leading support guarantees success from day one.

Our ATS & CRM recruitment software solution helps recruitment firms land the best hires, increase profitability, and achieve long-term growth by building extraordinary relationships.

We are recruiters at heart but in the uncanny position of being geekily obsessed with tech - a winning formula that has facilitated our success in the recruitment software space.

Tracker is dedicated to making the recruitment magic happen, whatever your industry. Our curious trouble-shooters are on a mission to reduce the workload of recruiters, unlock the power of recruiting teams, and make it easy for recruiters to find the right person for every job.

Since we set up (15+ years ago), our growth trajectory tells you a lot about us – we support our clients to succeed, and we now service over 5,000 happy, successful users! Everything about our software, including our approach to implementation and support, has been carefully curated to facilitate hiring triumphs, skyrocket the ambition of recruiters, and increase the profitability of recruiting firms.

We are all about pushing recruitment boundaries and we continually innovate to make hiring easier, faster, and better. Your success is our success, and we always keep sight of that.

Recruitment success comes first and foremost from building better relationships. We get that the true purpose of a good CRM is to develop and grow relationships. name: Children's Nebraska
description:
At Children’s Nebraska, our mission is to improve the life of every child through exceptional care, advocacy, research and education. From primary to specialty care, and everything in between: We are here to provide excellent care for your child. 

As a freestanding, independent nonprofit hospital, we value innovation, collaboration, accountability, respect and excellence. We are the only full-service, pediatric health care center in Nebraska, providing expertise in primary care and more than 50 pediatric specialty services to children and families across a five-state region and beyond. Children’s is home to Nebraska’s only Level IV regional Neonatal Intensive Care Unit and the state’s only Level II Pediatric Trauma Center, and is recognized as a 2023-24 Best Children’s Hospital by U.S. News & World Report in the pediatric specialty of Pulmonology.

As an organization, we lead with a People First philosophy, defined by our commitment to fostering an environment of safety, trust and belonging. Children’s celebrates a diverse, inclusive environment where every team member can embrace their authentic selves and thrive personally and professionally. Wellbeing is a strategic priority, with programs and initiatives in place to support team members’ mental, social, emotional, physical and financial wellbeing. 

Children’s is named one of the top in-state employers in Nebraska by Forbes in 2023, and is the only healthcare system in Nebraska to be named a 2023-23 gold recipient of Mental Health America’s Bell Seal Award for Workplace Mental Health.

To learn more, visit ChildrensNebraska.org.

name: Food Bank of Alaska
description:
No excuse for hunger.

With this core belief and a commitment to preventing good food from being wasted, a small group of Anchorage church and community volunteers organized Food Bank of Alaska in 1979 to serve the entire state.

Our role is unique. Food Bank of Alaska works with food industry partners to salvage food that would otherwise go to waste from grocery stores, wholesalers, producers, farmers, and the fishing industry. We also collect food donated by community members and administer government food programs. This food is then shipped statewide to 150 partner food pantries, soup kitchens, senior centers, and children’s programs feeding their hungry neighbors.

Currently 1 in 8 Alaskans, including 1 in 6 children, struggles with hunger. Your generosity makes it possible for Food Bank of Alaska to feed hungry children, families and seniors.

name: Staffing Theory
description:
Staffing Theory is a niche recruiting partner for the biopharma industry.  We conduct pre-clinical, clinical, commercial, and G&A placements globally, with experience in US, EU, Latin America, and Asia.

What does “staffing theory” mean?
It’s the behavioral effects of being over- or under-staffed.  Too few or too many employees, and the balance is off, the behavior of the staff reflects it, and company performance will suffer.  Ultimately, what an employer is looking for is “synomorphy,” the proper fit between employees and employers, and the right balance of headcount and behavior.

name: The National Exemplar
description:
In April of 1983, The National Exemplar began operation in the Mariemont, Ohio landmark, the Mariemont Inn. The Inn was constructed in the mid-1920's as a small piece of the very unique Mariemont community, founded by Mary Emery. The National Exemplar Restaurant was named after learning that Mary Emery once referred to her developing community as the National Exemplar, meaning national model community.

The National Exemplar Restaurant, located on the first floor of the hotel, is a popular neighborhood restaurant. It offers American-style cuisine in its spacious dining room or relaxing outdoor patio. Open daily for breakfast, lunch, and dinner, the National Exemplar offers an outstanding dining experience.

Southerby’s Pub, located off the lobby, offers dining as well as a cozy place to have a drink and features oversized chairs overlooking one of the original 1920’s fireplaces. In the evening settle down in an over-stuffed sofa and savor a drink with the locals in this intimate lobby pub.

name: NeuroJust
description:
NeuroJust is New Orleans’ leading provider of TMS therapy for the treatment of depression. When your current treatment is not enough, Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) Therapy is a safe and effective treatment for those diagnosed with depression.

Depression impacts every aspect of life and can make you feel sad and unfulfilled. NeuroJust uses Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) Therapy to adjust and strengthen inactive areas of your brain tied to depression. We change your mind, so you can change your life!
NeuroJust uses a non-invasive procedure that applies magnetic fields to stimulate nerve cells in the brain to improve symptoms of depression. TMS therapy offers:
* NO systemic side effects or drug-related side effects.
* Non-invasive and non-sedative treatment.
* More effective results than medications.
* Long-term relief.
* FDA-approval.
* Coverage by most insurance plans, with Medicare and Medicaid accepted. We assist patients with the reimbursement and financing process.
To learn more about NeuroJust and to find out if TMS therapy is right for you:
*Visit our website: www.neurojust.com
*Call to schedule an evaluation at 504-619-8621

No job is too big or too small for us. From multi-million dollar designs to moving your refrigerator, we get the job done with integrity and attention to detail. We have worked hard to gain our sterling reputation for HVAC, plumbing, and maintenance services.﻿
